---
title: "Pixie: Academic Materials"
---

This is the academic materials repository for the **Pixie** succinct data structures library.

## Contents

- **[Papers](papers/index.qmd)** -- Published and draft research papers
- **[Reports](reports/index.qmd)** -- Technical reports and design documents
- **[Presentations](presentations/index.qmd)** -- Conference talks and seminar slides
- **[Notes](notes/index.qmd)** -- Research notes and literature reviews

## Building

This project uses [Quarto](https://quarto.org). To render all materials:

```bash
quarto render
```

To render a specific section:

```bash
quarto render papers/
```

## Bibliography

The master bibliography lives in `bibliography/references.bib`. Cite with `@AuthorYear` syntax in any `.qmd` file.
